case_title: DOROTHY ESHELMAN VS. RENO PLACE LLC. et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESHELMAN, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT RENO PLACE LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESHELMAN, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT RENO PLACE LLC. W.B. COYLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESHELMAN, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT W.B. COYLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED FEB-19-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RENO PLACE LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESHELMAN, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT RENO PLACE LLC.
DECLARATION OF AMENDING THE COMPLAINT TO DISMISS W.B. COYLE FROM THE ACTIONS AS A DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESHELMAN, DOROTHY
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ESHELMAN, DOROTHY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESHELMAN, DOROTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RENO PLACE LLC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,150.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5600 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLAY WITH CC 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
